metadata.name: Claim Deduction for Student Loan Interest

description: A taxpayer who paid student loan interest wants to claim the deduction.

nodes.task_description: Obtain Form 1098-E, Student Loan Interest Statement, from the taxpayer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the necessary tax form.

nodes.task_description: Enter the amount of interest paid from Form 1098-E.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly inputs the interest amount.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the allowable deduction, taking into account any income phase-out limitations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the final deduction amount to be reported on Schedule 1.
